prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: A production node is killing processes because it is out of memory. Find the C source files in torvalds/linux that (1) detect global or cgroup memory pressure, (2) select a victim for the OOM killer, and (3) log or notify the final kill decision.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the linux-kernel fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: A production node is killing processes because it is out of memory. Find the C source files in torvalds/linux that (1) detect global or cgroup memory pressure, (2) select a victim for the OOM killer, and (3) log or notify the final kill decision.

params.search_pattern: oom OR out of memory OR victim OR cgroup
